titleStmt.title: SII 31.31: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 31. (A.R. No. B 337 of 1937.) MĀḌUGULA, PALNADU TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup near the dhvajastaṁbha of the Kaḷēśvara temple.
This undated inscription can be assigned to 12th century on the basis of palaeography and internal evidence.

Incomplete and refers to some gift (not specified) to the god Kāḷēśvaradēva at Malala Māḍugula while the king Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva was ruling over the country from Anumakoṇḍa paṭṭaṇa. King Gaṇapatidēva is endowed with the titles viz., Śrī Pṛiḍhivi vallabha, Paramēśvara, Paramabhaṭṭāraka Satyāśraya kula tillaka satyārādhēya similar to the Chālukyan titles.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīŌmnamaśivāyaḥ . namastuṁga śi
raścuṁbiścaṁdracāmara cāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāyasva
ṁbhavē . svastiśrī pridhivīvā (va)Figures of Sūrya, Śivaliṅga, ardhachadra are carved in between the line.
llabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramē
śvaraṁ pē(pa)ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyaśraya kula
tilakaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ kāketa
svasti . śrīmatu śakavarṣaṁbulu
puravarādhīśvaraṁ śrīgaṇapatidēvamahā
rājulanumakoṁḍapaṭṭaṇamunaṁdu su
khasaṁggatā vinōdamugānaṁdhrapridhvi rājya
musēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu rāju baliya
lu malala māḍugula kāḷēśvaradēva
riga śakavarṣaṁbulu Inscription ends
Digital edition of SII 31.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
